findings.title: Controls are real and operable
findings.message: The required evidence was not verified.
evidence: Controls were inventoried but live interaction replay was not completed.

findings.title: Responsive layouts do not clip or collide
findings.message: The required evidence was not verified.
evidence: The responsive viewport capture was not reliable enough to verify mobile clipping or overlap.

findings.title: Non-trivial motion has a reduced-motion path
findings.message: The required evidence was not verified.
evidence: Navigation transitions were measured, but reduced-motion behavior was not replayed.

acceptedContexts.title: Signature elements are grounded in the product
evidence: The giant Chinese display hierarchy and layered character collage intentionally dominate the first viewport.
acceptedContexts.rationale: The composition is grounded in the campaign's editorial world and should not be flattened into a conventional hero.

acceptedContexts.title: Fashion-pattern signals remain advisory
evidence: The design intentionally uses a pale editorial field, oversized display type, and restrained red accent.
acceptedContexts.rationale: These choices form a cohesive ink-light profile rather than a generic luxury template.
